title: BEM-865 inspect codex wiring
objective:
Run script:
"""
p = Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
text = p.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if p.exists() else ''
checks = {
    'file_exists': p.exists(),
    'has_process_step': 'Process workflow dispatch queue' in text,
    'has_processor_script_call': 'scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.py' in text,
    'has_GH_TOKEN': 'GH_TOKEN' in text,
    'has_always': 'if: always()' in text,
}
status = 'WIRED' if all(checks.values()) else 'NOT_WIRED'
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM865_CODEX_RUNNER_WIRING_' + status + '.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-865 codex-runner wiring inspection\nStatus: ' + status + '\n' + '\n'.join('- ' + k + ': ' + str(v) for k, v in checks.items()) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('codex-runner wiring inspection: ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
